task_completion.description: Locate and load the two input elevation tiles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing dem_tile_west.tif and dem_tile_east.tif loaded in a GIS application's layer panel (e.g., QGIS) or explicitly referenced in a terminal command.

task_completion.description: Open the raster merge tool and select the input tiles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Merge' dialog box is open in a GIS application with both dem_tile_west and dem_tile_east selected as input layers, or a gdal_merge.py command is being constructed in the terminal with both files as arguments.

task_completion.description: Set the output data type to Float32.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Merge dialog, the 'Output data type' dropdown is explicitly set to 'Float32', or the terminal command includes the '-ot Float32' flag.

task_completion.description: Specify the correct output file path for the merged DEM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The output file path in the Merge dialog or terminal command is exactly set to '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/merged_dem.tif'.

task_completion.description: Execute the merge operation and verify the seamless output covers the combined extent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new layer named 'merged_dem' appears in the layers panel and is visible on the map canvas covering the combined area of both original tiles without gaps, or a terminal shows successful completion of the merge command creating the file.

integrity.description: The agent used actual GIS software (like QGIS) or valid GDAL terminal commands to perform the merge.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with QGIS menus/dialogs or legitimate gdal_merge.py terminal execution, rather than a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the merge process by creating an empty or fake file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is not seen using commands like 'touch /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/merged_dem.tif' or simply renaming one of the input files to the output name.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually type out success messages or expected extents to simulate completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: Output logs, layer properties, and success bars are generated by the system/GIS software, not typed into a text editor or echoed in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input files: /home/ga/GIS_Data/rasters/dem_tile_west.tif and /home/ga/GIS_Data/rasters/dem_tile_east.tif. Expected output file: /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/merged_dem.tif. Expected combined extent: [-122.5, 37.5, -121.5, 38.0]. Coordinate Reference System: EPSG:4326. Data type: Float32.
